title: phalangium pomeridianum
intro: Phalangium pomeridianum, commonly known as evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which is an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of evening primrose oil include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and eczema. Evening primrose oil can be prepared through cold-pressing the seeds or extracting the oil through a solvent, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tinctures, and topical creams.
